steps.title: Use the objective contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts Hale's approach with sentimental approaches and then compares his work to photographs that seem like objective documentations of life. The missing word should mean unemotional or objective.

steps.title: Choose the detached tone
steps.content: Choice A means peaceful, Choice B means unusual, and Choice C means wistfully sentimental, which is the opposite of the needed contrast. The remaining choice means free from emotion or bias, matching the objective-documentation clue. The answer is D.
